old_column.content: description: API docs for the Wrap components in Chakra UI

new_column.content: description: API docs for the Wrap components in Chakra UI

old_column.content: Wrap is a layout component that adds a defined space between its children. It

new_column.content: Wrap is a layout component that adds a defined space between its children. It

old_column.content: 'wraps' its children automatically if there isn't enough space to fit any child.

new_column.content: 'wraps' its children automatically if there isn't enough space to fit any child.

old_column.content: Think of it as a smarter `flex-wrap` with `spacing` support. It works really

new_column.content: Think of it as a smarter `flex-wrap` with `spacing` support. It works really

old_column.content: well with things like dialog buttons, tags, and chips.

new_column.content: well with things like dialog buttons, tags, and chips.

old_column.content: - **Wrap**: Wrap composes the `Box` component and renders a `<ul>` tag

new_column.content: - **Wrap**: Wrap composes the `Box` component and renders a `<ul>` tag

old_column.content: - **WrapItem**: WrapItem composes the `Box` component and renders the HTML

new_column.content: - **WrapItem**: WrapItem composes the `Box` component and renders the HTML

old_column.content: In the example below, you see that the last `Box` wrapped to the next line.

new_column.content: In the example below, you see that the last `Box` wrapped to the next line.

old_column.content: Pass the `spacing` prop to apply consistent spacing between each child, even if

new_column.content: Pass the `spacing` prop to apply consistent spacing between each child, even if

old_column.content: > Pro Tip: You can pass responsive values for the spacing.

new_column.content: > Pro Tip: You can pass responsive values for the spacing.

old_column.content: Pass the `align` prop to change the alignment of the child along the main axis.

new_column.content: Pass the `align` prop to change the alignment of the child along the main axis.

old_column.content: Pass the `justify` prop to change the alignment of the child along the cross

new_column.content: Pass the `justify` prop to change the alignment of the child along the cross

old_column.content: Wrap extends `Box`, so you can pass all `Box` props in addition to these:

new_column.content: Wrap extends `Box`, so you can pass all `Box` props in addition to these:
